summary: Iteration 9 — Bug fixes: (1) CalmeOstéo URL updated + (2) FAQ accordion visibility fix. All 12 test checks PASS. Frontend 100%.

issues: urlDisplay: 'calmeosteo.wlbookings.com' is defined in demos array but NOT rendered as visible text in the card template. The href is correct (https://calmeosteo.wlbookings.com). If displaying the URL text below the button is intentional, add {demo.urlDisplay} to the JSX.

critical_code_review_comments: accordion.jsx: CLEAN — no inline style override for --radix-accordion-content-height. AccordionContent uses className only with animate-accordion-down/up.

index.css: animate-accordion-down/up use 'forwards' fill-mode. Fallback CSS [data-radix-accordion-content][data-state='open'] and [role='region'][data-state='open'] → height: auto !important confirmed in compiled CSS.
Exemples.jsx: CalmeOstéo url correctly set to 'https://calmeosteo.wlbookings.com'. urlDisplay field defined but not rendered in template (minor — no visible text showing the URL on the card).
FAQ on /contact: No accordion present — expected ('si présent' condition).
test_credentials: Admin: /admin/login, password JQi]=3+8Azc4 (not needed for this test)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 9: Both bug fixes fully verified. (1) CalmeOstéo URL = https://calmeosteo.wlbookings.com confirmed. No 'ostodirect' in source. (2) FAQ accordion works on /solution (9 items), /offres (8 items), /exemples (6 items). Open content height > 0, overflow=visible. Q3 open/close toggle works. accordion.jsx has no style override. CSS fallback rules confirmed in compiled CSS. /contact has no FAQ (correct). Minor: urlDisplay field defined in Exemples.jsx but not rendered as visible text.
